calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Robert E. Aune , Esq. for the plaintiff La Galleria Condominium Owners' Association.
Witness for plaintiff: Mary Jacobs placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendants Michael D. Anderson has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $7,399.24
Prejudgment Interest $
Attorneys' fees -
Costs - $445.00 for a Total of $7,844.24
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
